text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains provides essential nutrients, while regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, strengthens the body and boosts energy. Equally important is getting enough sleep, as it helps the brain recharge and supports overall health. Mental health also plays a key role; managing stress through activities like meditation or hobbies can improve mood and focus. Finally, achieving a good work-life balance, by setting boundaries between professional and personal time, reduces burnout and promotes long-term well-being. Small, consistent steps in these areas can lead to a happier, healthier life.
